info.title: dotnetCampus.WriteAppVersionTask
info.description:
Copyright © 2021-2026 dotnet campus, All Rights Reserved.
-f, --AssemblyInfoFile    Required. The assmebly info file
-v, --AppVersion          The version will write to assembly file. The default
version will read from configurtion.
-r, --VersionFormat       The version format regex, default is Version =
\"(\d+.\d+.\d+)\";
--help                    Display this help screen.
--version                 Display version information.

options.name: --AppVersion
options.description:
The version will write to assembly file. The default
version will read from configurtion.

options.name: --VersionFormat
options.description:
The version format regex, default is Version =
\"(\d+.\d+.\d+)\";
